teeth-whitening-101-how-to-get-your-best: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="37744" img_size="full" alignment="center"][vc_column_text] IMAGE: INSTAGRAM @ROMEESTRIJD [/vc_column_text][vc_separator][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]This is especially true for those of us known to love a glass of merlot on more days of the week that we’d like to admit, and/or those who can’t get through a workday sans a latte or three (we plead the fifth). On our quest for a Hollywood-worthy smile to rival that of Romee Strijd (both on and off camera) we’ve enlisted the help of a nifty cosmetic treatment - Sparkling White Smile . The treatment works if your natural teeth are stained, a little on the yellow side, or simply not as bright and white as you’d like them to be. This was the beauty treatment that ensued the highest barrage of compliments this year – and that’s saying something, because we’re lucky enough to get to test the best of the (beauty) bunch.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_column_text]
heres-exactly-what-you-need-to-do-to-pre: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]“With age, the skin itself changes with a loss of collagen and support as well as a loss of elastin,” Dr Jameson tells us. “Elastin provides the skin with the ability to stretch and snap back into position and when elastin is lost the skin becomes loose and slack and is unable to maintain its structure and position.” “In addition to these changes the skin itself thins and becomes more transparent through changes to the epidermis as well as changes to the epidermal-dermal junction which flattens out and results in more fragile skin.” Plus, our skin naturally gets weaker as we age, and while the changes might be visible on a surface level, Dr Jameson says skin sagging can be attributed to a loss of supportive structures beneath the skin as they result in less support. “Atrophy of the fat pads, bone loss and resorption as well as cartilage loss all contribute to loss of the facial structure. The skin therefore loses its platform of support resulting in a sagging appearance.”[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]
these-are-the-best-vitamins-for-your-ski: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]While our oral consumption of vitamins continues to surge, only 1-2 per cent of digested vitamins reach our skin. By contrast, vitamins applied direct to our skin have a far greater impact, helping to counter fine lines and pigmentation, boost collagen, fight the impact of free radicals, and pump up hydration levels. Talk about kicking goals. Amping up these benefits, the science of vitamin skincare has advanced significantly in recent years. Not only have cosmetic companies created more effective product formulas, bringing together synergistic ingredients, they’ve identified new natural vitamin sources like the Australian Kakadu plum, brimming with vitamin C.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]
these-wellness-boosting-supplements-dese: [vc_row][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="49552" img_size="full" onclick="custom_link" img_link_target="_blank" link="https://www.chemistwarehouse.com.au/buy/102157/healthy-care-brain-booster-ginkgo-biloba-6000mg-60-capsules"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_column_text]
the-five-very-best-sunscreens-to-wear-ev: [vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_separator][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] The One That's a No-Brainer La Roche-Posay Anthelios Invisible Fluid Facial Sunscreen SPF50+ (organic/chemical)[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]You’ve probably heard of this one before, and with good reason – it’s an absolute classic. The thin texture means it absolutely glides on, takes no effort to rub in, and layers easily over other skincare you have applied before it. It also works wonderfully well under makeup, with no pilling, no patchiness, and no ridiculous shine. It has no discernible scent beyond a slight ‘sunscreen’ smell that disappears immediately. Plus it has very clever, compact, easy to use packaging (a tiny, flat rectangle) while still containing a standard 50ml of product, and its fine squeezy nozzle makes it easy to dispense as much as you wish. Honestly, it’s an absolutely ideal sunscreen. Bonus points: easy for anyone and everyone to use, stocked everywhere, routinely on sale.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="57379" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" img_link_target="_blank" link="https://adorebeauty.prf.hn/l/KN3898X"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] The One With The Best Packaging Sonny & Felix Nude-E SPF 50+ (organic/chemical)[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]This sunscreen is housed in my all-time favorite type of skincare packaging – a twist up bottle. Simply twist it gently one way to reveal the pump, and once you've dispensed what you need, twist it back down in the opposite directly so it’s completely flat and the pump is hidden. Friendly to those with mobility issues, leak-proof, and great for travel, as there’s no components to potentially break. The sunscreen inside is just as good – fragrance-free, it leaves skin glowing but not overly shiny, and is excellent under makeup. Bonus points: The brand’s too-cute tiny orange hippo logo, used because hippos’ skin naturally secretes a UV-protecting element. Nice for some![/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="57375" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" img_link_target="_blank" link="https://sonnyandfelix.com.au/products/nude-e"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] The One If You Want a Mineral Sunscreen Dr Sam’s Flawless Gossamer SPF50 (physical/mineral)[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] Dr Sam Bunting ’s Gossamer zinc-based sunscreen managed to make me, a fairly die-hard chemical sunscreen fan, like mineral sunscreen again. When applying, it definitely takes a while for so much zinc to sink into the skin, which is ultimately why I prefer chemical formulas, but if for whatever reason you want or need a mineral sunscreen, this is the one to go for. It comes in a squeezy pump tube with a cap, and is fragrance-free. Being available in tinted (one for deeper skintones, one for lighter) and untinted versions, means it is a viable option for many. I like to use the tinted version for the face and non-tinted for the neck, to avoid getting colour on the neckline of clothes. The tinted version is properly pigmented, so much so that on a hot summer day, wearing this alone will give you plenty of foundation-like lift in evening your skin tone, and then you can just add concealer or powder to any areas where you want extra coverage. Speaking of which, this does give a very glowy finish, so be warned that if you have an oilier skin, the look could easily veer into sweaty territory unless you add powder. Bonus points: the packaging gives directions to use exactly six pumps for the face and again for the neck, and has been designed so that six pumps gives exactly 1.25ml. More of this across the board, please.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="57376" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" img_link_target="_blank" link="https://drsambunting.com/products/flawless-gossamer-untinted-spf-50"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] The One If You Wear Makeup Mecca Cosmetica To Save Face SPF50+ Superscreen Oxybenzone Free Formula (organic/chemical) [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Mecca’s utterly excellent To Save Face sunscreen has been around for years, but never got the appreciation it deserved before the importance of daily sunscreen application hit the public conscience in recent times. The original version contained the organic UV filter oxybenzone, but as there is some still-up-for-debate concern that this ingredient may damage reefs when worn in the ocean, Mecca, like many brands, made the decision to remove it out of caution. I am happy to report that the reformulated version is just as good, and still in its practical, squeezable matte black tube. It really feels like high end skincare; a fairly thick cream (think plush and pillowy, not sticky) that sinks in effortlessly, and is just gorgeous under makeup. We all know that sunscreen is skincare and not makeup – cue the appropriately horrified 'Gywneth using SPF as highlighter’ outcry heard round the world – but this does feel like a sort of skincare/makeup hybrid, as it is cosmetically elegant enough that it could be used as a primer even when applying enough to get adequate sun protection. It has a flattering beigey, peachy tint to it that doesn’t add pigment or coverage but just helps prevent a ghosty look, and while it does have the signature Mecca light floral scent, do not be concerned if you’re finicky about fragrance, as it fades away quickly. An absolute gem. Bonus points: at 75ml, each tube contains 50% more product than the standard 50ml of most facial sunscreens, but is only priced like its significantly smaller counterparts.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="57377" img_size="full" onclick="custom_link" img_link_target="_blank" link="https://www.mecca.com.au/mecca-cosmetica/to-save-face-spf50-superscreen-oxybenzone-free-formula/V-853272.html"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] The One That Will Make You Rethink Sunscreen Ultra Violette SPF50+ Queen Screen Lightweight Skinscreen (organic/chemical)[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Housed in an eye-catching cobalt blue glass dropper bottle with a neon orange top, just seeing this product for the first time implants the thought of ‘sunscreen as proper skincare’, and bravo to the Ultra Violette queens for that. Its runny, serum-like texture upended the sunscreen status quo, and made it the easiest to apply of all products trialled. Containing a soft, magnolia-like scent that fades immediately after application, it leaves skin gorgeously radiant without being overly shiny, and is, as you might expect, a perfect base for makeup. Bonus points: a true gamechanger ­– who knew sunscreen could feel utterly weightless? Guaranteed to be unlike any other you've tried.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="57378" img_size="full" onclick="custom_link" img_link_target="_blank" link="https://adorebeauty.prf.hn/l/7x0N8Vn"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]
me-skin-and-body-south-yarra-facial-revi:
The Facial: Synergie Skindulgence in Expert Hands

Why Massage Makes All the Difference

What Is Buccal Massage — And Why You Need It

Post-Facial Glow and Acupressure Bliss

What Else Is On Offer at Me Skin & Body?

The Verdict: A Reset for Skin and Soul

In a world of rushed appointments and tech-first facials, Me Skin & Body is a rare find. It delivers real results and holds space for deep rest — something both your face and your nervous system will thank you for.

If you’re in Melbourne and craving that elusive balance of skin transformation and total relaxation — you know where to book.
bring-life-back-to-hair:
Your hair goes through a lot—heat styling, environmental stressors, and everyday wear and tear can leave it looking dull and lifeless. But with the right care, you can restore its health, shine, and vibrancy.

From deep-conditioning masks to scalp scrubs and spring styling trends, here’s how to revive your strands and keep them looking fresh year-round.
wolgan-valley-resort-wolgan-valley: [vc_row css=".vc_custom_1528421560986{padding-top: 40px !important;}"][vc_column][vc_custom_heading text="The drive into Wolgan Valley is all part of the decompression process. After three hours of cruising through the Blue Mountains and beyond, past grazing cattle and picturesque dams, you descend a steep and windy road into the valley. You can’t help but be struck by the magnificent Australianness of it all: the dense khaki scrub, Rosellas flitting between the gums and on either side, steep cliffs rise above you. They are craggy and golden-tinged, like they’ve been dipped in leatherbox honey. As you take in all this beauty, you can literally feel the urban stress dissipating from your body… shoulders drop, knots unfurl. You have arrived." font_container="tag:h3|text_align:left" use_theme_fonts="yes" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_separator][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="5/12"][vc_single_image image="18992" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_custom_heading text="THE RESORT IS TUCKED INTO GORGEOUS HILLS" font_container="tag:h3|text_align:center" use_theme_fonts="yes" css_animation="fadeInUp" el_class="img-title"][/vc_column][vc_column width="7/12"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]I had been anticipating this for weeks. Damien and I had left our Max with his grandparents for the night – for a very rare and special night away together. I had been invited to Emirates One & Only Wolgan Valley to sample their spa and try the new Sodashi Samadara Illuminating Age-Defying Facial – a beautiful treatment that coincides with the launch of the brands delicious new Samadara Ultimate Age Defying Elixir. Wolgan Valley is one of Australia’s top luxury conservation-led resorts. The private and uber-luxurious property is on a vast 400 acre reserve and is where visiting millionaires and celebrities come to escape the paps and experience the Crocodile Dundee dream – all in five-star comfort, of course. Naturally, we are pretty excited.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="7/12"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]The next stage of the induction involves shedding all of your worldly possessions. Well, not exactly…. but you leave your car in a carpark a few kms away and climb aboard the resort’s standard issue Landcruisers to navigate the creeks in full 4WD mode. It certainly adds to the feeling of transitioning, journeying into something so far from the world you’ve just come from. As you drive into the property you are hit with nature in full force: wildlife at every turn, the smell of the eucalyptus and this beautiful golden light bouncing off the mountains surrounding you. It’s ethereal and incredibly beautiful. The stuff Aussie Tourism commercials are made of. Once in the homestead, you’re given a glass of sparkling to ease into the check in process before being led to your private suite.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="5/12"][vc_single_image image="18990" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_custom_heading text="THE FOOD IS A STANDOUT" font_container="tag:h3|text_align:center" use_theme_fonts="yes" css_animation="fadeInUp" el_class="img-title"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="5/12"][vc_single_image image="18991" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_custom_heading text="A PRETTY LIFE-CHANGING BREAKFAST" font_container="tag:h3|text_align:center" use_theme_fonts="yes" css_animation="fadeInUp" el_class="img-title"][/vc_column][vc_column width="7/12"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]24 hours went by in a blur of rugged luxury. We kicked back in our palatial villa – complete with its own double-sided fireplace and seven metre indoor plunge pool. We went for long walks around the property among friendly wallaroos and wombats, and rode our bikes to and from the homestead where we feasted on the most spectacular meals. After dinner, the cheese room was like a religious experience (or maybe it was just one too many dessert wines) and breakfast was similarly impressive with a serving of Borodell Truffled eggs that very nearly changed my life.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="7/12"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]And finally, the piece de resistance: the spa. Tenneille, who was my therapist and the spa manager welcomed me, gave me a tea, then led me into a treatment room with postcard views out to the valley. As if on cue, a little bunny hopped into view. Inside, it’s all peaceful shades of cream, eggshell and warm teak overtones with a huge stone geisha tub and a deliciously soft treatment bed. Tenneille cleansed my skin with the most incredible smelling clay cleanser and did a warm compresses with citrus-spiked oils to open my pores and exfoliate my skin. “This facial is oxygenating and brightening and it uses the new intensive Elixir which is the ultimate age-defying product,” she explained, all the while expertly massaging my skin, pummeling out the knots that live just below the surface.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="5/12"][vc_single_image image="18993" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_custom_heading text="THE SPA WAS WARM, WELCOMING, AND INVITING" font_container="tag:h3|text_align:center" use_theme_fonts="yes" css_animation="fadeInUp" el_class="img-title"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="5/12"][vc_single_image image="18994" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_custom_heading text="IT WAS TOUGH TO GO BACK TO THE REAL WORLD AFTER SUCH A HEAVENLY 24 HOURS" font_container="tag:h3|text_align:center" use_theme_fonts="yes" css_animation="fadeInUp" el_class="img-title"][/vc_column][vc_column width="7/12"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]"All Samadara products contain rose quartz water, which is calming and is hydrosol meaning it can work deeper into the skin. The Elixir has about 19 different ingredients in it and has been five years in the making. Since it launched in May, it’s been incredibly popular, it’s sold out everywhere. It contains gotu kola, a type of white tea which his the highest antioxidant that energises everything and arnica which is soothing,” said Tenneille, before she layered some more deliciousness on my face. It smelt like going for a bushwalk after the rain. When she finished I could actually feel my skin zinging with happiness. I examined it in the mirror and it was all glowy and hydrated. This is a very nourishing, calming facial - perfect for stressed skins (and souls). At the counter before I left, I had a little play with the Sodashi range. I love that the Samadara cream and eye cream come with little rose quartz crystals and a booklet which explains how to massage the product into the skin. And with that, it was checkout time, and time to go back to the real world. At least I was doing it with good skin. Review by Sigourney Cantelo [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]
miss-fox-melbourne: There is nothing more exciting than finding a hidden treasure in the middle of a bustling city. Somewhere you can go that will take you out of your busy everyday life and treat you to complete relaxation and pampering. This is exactly what Miss Fox will do for you. Located on Little Collins St in Melbourne, it has fast become my favourite salon for very good reasons. Miss Fox is inspired by the decedent 1940s and 1950s, which is evident from the interior design down to the list of French Champagnes, which you can enjoy during your visit. Miss Fox offers a range of treatments designed to pamper you head-to-toe by the best beauty therapists in town. Some of the luxurious and unique treatments include: Precious gemstone facials, coconut melt body massages, rose milk baths and manicures with 24 Karat Gold Leaf nail art. For those who want the ultimate body pampering session, Miss Fox offers an Arabian gold indulgence ritual, which lasts for 6.5 hours and includes full body treatments with lunch and unlimited French Champagne. Miss Fox is the euphoria of beauty salons, I could not think of anywhere else as glamorous and relaxing. If you are looking to treat yourself or someone special than I highly recommend this hidden sanctuary. Review by Tenille McClelland
face-plus-bondi-beach: [vc_row css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_column_text]Perusing the treatment menu prior to my appointment I’m dazzled by the breadth and depth of what’s on offer at the new Face Plus. I’ve visited Bondi Junction before and was very happy with the laser genesis facials I tried. They do everything from lasers and injectables through to massage and energy healing and even more traditional beauty services like brows and lashes. But what I’m really interested in is their Drip and IV Therapy. I’ve been trying everything to get rid of this lingering lurgy and have heard that intravenous vitamin therapy can help boost the immune system.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="8850" img_size="full"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="8851" img_size="full"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_column_text]Ducking into Face Plus on a rainy winters day, I can’t think of a nicer place to take shelter from the storm. As I step through glass doors past a vibrant fiddle tree fig, a bright white haven opens up. Designed by architect Steven Mooney, the interiors are fresh and crisp, with oceanic elements inspired by the nearby ebb of Bondi’s coastline. Aquabumps photos adorn the walls, punctuating the white with electric azure pops of colour. I fill out a treatment form on an ipad and am given a very special water (it’s Alkaline Kagen water with a ph level 8.5 and infused with fresh lemon and cucumber, I’m told) and a cup of Edible Beauty tea. So far, so fabulous.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_column_text]My registered nurse Susi takes me through and we have a chat about my health. She prescribes the Bondi Rescue which contains a high dose Vitamin C along with antioxidant-rich Glutathione, vitamin B1,2,3,5&6, and Zinc and a session under the Healite (LED Light Therapy). When I mention that I haven’t eaten lunch, I’m given a snack – some raw, organic, locally-made bliss balls and an elixir from The Beauty Chef. We do a skype with Dr Will, to sign off the treatment and then it’s time to put the needle in – see my video here to see it in action and find out what I thought of the treatment.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="8852" img_size="full"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="8853" img_size="full"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_column_text]As for the clinic itself, I was really impressed with the level of detail and the thought put behind every aspect of my treatment. It’s these little touches that make you feel confident when you’re putting your face - and body - in someone else’s hands. When you’re venturing into the high tech or medical space with your treatments, that’s really important. I wasn’t surprised to find out that Face Plus Bondi Beach were awarded the Best Aesthetic Practice NSW in the My Face My Body Awards last year. It would definitely get my vote.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_column][vc_column_text]
beauty-on-latrobe-paddington: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] Nestled in leafy Paddington lies a quintessential Queensland workers cottage. With its high ceilings, sparkling chandeliers and polished interiors, Beauty on Latrobe is a whimsical world away from the hustle and bustle of one of Brisbane’s most buzzing lifestyle destinations. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Stepping off the tree lined footpath and through the doors of Beauty on Latrobe, I’m welcomed with a smile by Chloe – who immediately ushers me into the waiting area. I’m instantly relaxed, feeling the stress of my day wash away with one sip of the sparkling lemon water. Senior facialist Calina greets me and asks some general questions about my skin before showing me to the OBSERV machine. For anyone who hasn’t had the pleasure (or displeasure) of using one of these machines, they go deep into the layers of your skin to diagnose skin conditions – and believe me when I say it can be a little confronting.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="27943" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="27945" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]I needed some direction and advice from Beauty on Latrobe professional. I’m suffering with from serious hormonal acne (I’m talking a full blown cystic chin) and Calina suggests I try the Ultraceuticals Mandelic Acid Peel. This facial is heavy duty, it encourages the skins own regenerative functions and assists with cell turnover to reveal a fresher glowing complexion – which I desperately need. Calina’s knowledge of skincare truly blows me away. Trained in Germany, with five years experience, she blends beauty with brains talking me through every element of the facial. As she applies the mandelic acid, Calina notes that this peel is a go-to for problematic skin.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Perfect for wrinkles, surface texture and of course, acne – this potent AHA is derived from almonds (everyones favourite nut). It decongests the skin, deeply exfoliating and cleaning pores to help clear dead skin cells. At this point, I’m pretty excited by the prospect of saying bye-bye to my cystic nightmare. After cleansing the acid from my face, my face was illuminated by glowing white light, which Calina notes is “Healite” for my chimples whilst I was spoilt with a neck and décolletage massage. In my bid to resolve my acne issues, Calina tells me that I have severely dehydrated my skin with a series of stripping and harsh products (oops). To deeply moisturize, hydrate and rebalance my skin barrier, Calina finishes my treatment with a Replenishing Mask, Antioxidant Serum and Ultra Moisturiser Cream.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="27948" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="27949" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]It was hard not to hang around with Calina and Chloe at Beauty on Latrobe, who were so passionate about their work. Calina and I chat about how to restore my dry, yet acne covered face – she recommends the Even Skintone Serum Concentrate which is full of AHAs, BHAs along with Niacinamide to improve my lipid barrier. A full two hours later, I walk out the doors feeling completely blissed out and totally refreshed. I often joke, that a facial isn’t effective unless you peel – and boy did I ever! But it was more satisfying than I could imagine. Four days later, all of my dead skin cells made way for fresh glowing near pimple-less skin, and I’m getting closer, by the day, to my goal of an immaculate complexion.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Review by Elyse Goyen.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]
find-some-respite-from-the-urban-grind-a: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] The retreat is made up of an interconnected spa and café, and being my klutzy self, I managed to make it into the café first, despite having been aiming for the spa. It seemed a stroke of luck anyway, as a quick scan over the airy, light space reaffirmed my excitement for my post-treatment solo brunch plans. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="45559" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] Speaking of my being klutzy… just before my appointment, I had rolled my ankle. I wish I had a better story, but a review demands the truth and so – I was watching too much trashy TV, my foot went to sleep, and I got up and fell down. Willow’s staff couldn’t have been more accommodating right from the beginning, when the receptionist kindly led me up to the treatment spaces via a tiny lift. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="45561" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] I hobbled down the hallway to the waiting room, which felt like entering a cave on a Greek island. The space, designed by female-led interior design firm MEME , is instantly soothing, largely thanks to the stripped back walls and curved lines, but also has real style. I instantly felt like I was in good hands, and hadn’t even met my therapist Mark yet, who shortly came in to collect me and deposited me for my Blissful Marma massage. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="45562" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] As I settled into the plush bed made up with light linen sheets, I realised the bed itself was warmed, rather than the whole room, which was such a nice touch – I felt cosy but never overheated. While the hallmark of a massage is often identical treatment performed on each half of the body, Mark took beautiful, obviously knowledgeable, care of my injured foot and tailored his treatment on each side of my lower body to the specific muscles I found myself over or under using, now that I was suddenly walking with a cane. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="43180" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] In terms of the all-important back and neck portion of the massage, it felt like he found problems I didn’t even know I had, and took care of them – short, firm pressure down the sides of my neck felt like he was literally pushing away my I-spend-all-day-typing-and-evidently-do-so-quite-hunched pain. Overall, the hour I spent under his healing hands felt like being treated by a particularly knowledgeable physio, with all the joy of a luxe spa treatment. And on that note, nothing irks me more during a massage than the therapist using scant amounts of oil so that your skin ends up being pulled, and in this instance the oil was so generous that I felt rather like a turkey, being lovingly prepared by Nigella for Christmas Day. Bliss. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="43182" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="43183" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Wandering out, slightly dazed, to the café next door, I decided to celebrate my truly brilliant treatment with Obama’s masseur (yes, really) with decadent spiced pumpkin hotcakes served with whipped coconut yoghurt and caramelized banana. I couldn’t have chosen a happier place to start trying to improve my posture as I worked away on the dreaded computer – there’s blonde wood, Scandi feel tables filled with the flowover from the retreat’s exercise classes lounging in fancy athletic gear, and friendly staff who are proactively open to dietary requirements, in keeping with the overall focus on health and wellness. And just on the issue of that dreaded computer, I can happily confirm I had an entire week, even as I continued to hunch and hobble, pain-free after my visit to Willow.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]
dyson-v16-piston-animal-submarine-review:
Yet suddenly, here I am, one Thursday night, lovingly taking it apart and detailing it with an old toothbrush, and, strangely, not minding one little bit.

This is not who I used to be.

Vacuum maintenance was always my hard no. The worst job in the house. The scissors. The hair. The gag reflex. The sense that I was wasting my one precious life dealing with something that should have worked better in the first place.

But this machine changed the dynamic.

The Dyson V16 Piston Animal Submarine quietly turned a job I loathed into something I… enjoy. Deeply. Repeatedly. Possibly too much.
how-to-spring-racing-beauty-edit: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image="27307" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] IMAGE: INSTAGRAM @NADIABARTELL [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Punctuating the grass (or mud, eek!) with Altazurra and Alaia is but a rite of passage for many a mare. As we descend upon a floral-filled Flemington juggling cameras, adjusting bustiers, we hold down headpieces in the unpredictable rain, hail or shine. Amid the awkward sideways hat-kisses, flutes full o' bubbles and unlearned but enthusiastic bets, is a riot of colour and texture playing out on both fabric and face. We break down the various race day rules and get essential advice from those in the know trackside.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] DERBY DAY
vs-countdown-angels-gram-their-way-to-pa: Image: @sarasampaio 0 0 1 69 398 Rikki Hodge 3 1 466 14.0 Normal 0 false false false EN-AU JA X-NONE /* Style Definitions */ table.MsoNormalTable {mso-style-name:"Table Normal"; mso-tstyle-rowband-size:0; mso-tstyle-colband-size:0; mso-style-noshow:yes; mso-style-priority:99; mso-style-parent:""; mso-padding-alt:0cm 5.4pt 0cm 5.4pt; mso-para-margin:0cm; mso-para-margin-bottom:.0001pt; mso-pagination:widow-orphan; font-size:12.0pt; font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-hansi-font-family:Cambria; mso-hansi-theme-font:minor-latin;} It’s that time of year again… The Victoria Secret runway show (the only runway on Earth that is more about the Who’s Who on the catwalk than the front row) is just days away and the Angels are out in force gearing up for the lingerie spectacular. This year, the show will be in Paris – the first French VS show - and include veterans Lily Aldridge, Adriana Lima and Alessandra Ambrosio, new wings Bella Hadid, Brooke Perry and Grace Elizabeth and the 'It Girl' tribe of Gigi Hadid, Kendall Jenner and Karlie Kloss. The svelte army of Angels have Insta’d their way from terminal to terminal (a flight that has become a show in itself), capturing every BTS moment… 0 0 1 2 12 Rikki Hodge 1 1 13 14.0 Normal 0 false false false EN-AU JA X-NONE /* Style Definitions */ table.MsoNormalTable {mso-style-name:"Table Normal"; mso-tstyle-rowband-size:0; mso-tstyle-colband-size:0; mso-style-noshow:yes; mso-style-priority:99; mso-style-parent:""; mso-padding-alt:0cm 5.4pt 0cm 5.4pt; mso-para-margin:0cm; mso-para-margin-bottom:.0001pt; mso-pagination:widow-orphan; font-size:12.0pt; font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-hansi-font-family:Cambria; mso-hansi-theme-font:minor-latin;}
should-you-apply-fake-tan-on-top-of-an-e: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="36531" img_size="full"][vc_column_text] IMAGE: INSTAGRAM @BALMOAN [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] A: Great question Caitlyn! With summer in full swing, and the big-limb reveal a daily occurrence (stressful, we know), there’s been no better time to (faux) tan up. While fake tanning has come a long way since the days of orange streaks and pungent tell-tale smell, mistakes can, and do, happen. Now that it’s officially body-baring weather, it’s important that you choose your tanning routine wisely to keep mishaps to a minimum. Here, we’ll answer your question, as well as offering a few nifty tips that will have you nailing the tan game in no time. It’s time to get glowing…[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_separator][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Okay, let’s cut right to the chase – you should never apply your tan on top of an existing tan. (Unless it’s with a gradual tanning product that you are using to build up your colour). A dark lotion or mousse on top of an existing tan will highlight the breakup of the older colour, resulting in patchy, not-at-all natural-looking skin (eek!). So, enjoy your tan for about one and a half weeks, then scrub down and start fresh. Our four trusted, tried and tested methods for removing a tan are as follows: [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]
paddington-beauty-room-paddington: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]In an elegant monochrome terrace beside the famous Five Ways intersection in Paddington lies a firmly established beauty salon with a reputation for expert advice. Under the direction of industry stalwart Anna Field, The Paddington Beauty Room has been coaxing skin into good health for over 14 years and Anna has been in the industry for 28 years.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25728" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] THE SALON HAS A WARM, INVITING FEEL [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]The salon has a sleek yet homely feel with high ceilings, chandeliers, warm polished floorboards and silver accents to match the elegant La Prairie and Dermalogica products on display. Four spacious treatment rooms and a spray tan room allow the staff to offer multiple treatments under one roof - and often at the same time. From facials and waxing to IPL and St. Tropez spray tans, it’s perfect for their time-poor, yet well-heeled clientele. I chose the Caviar Executive La Prairie facial treatment with a Manicure on the side, as Anna said it’s perfect for multi-taskers like me. It takes all the best bits of the 90 minute La Prairie facials (e.g. the incredible massage) yet shrinks it down to a manageable lunch hour. The lovely Lia was on hand to do my manicure throughout, so I could kill two birds with one very beautiful stone.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]I’m always excited to have a facial with Anna – she’s a bit of a legend in the beauty industry. She was the National Training and Promotions Manager for La Prairie for ten years, which involved travelling the world training therapists on how to give the ultimate facial, and learning about products from the heads of research and development teams. Apart from giving the most sublime face and neck massage, she also hands out no-nonsense advice and tips during the treatment, that always results in me making little changes to my skincare routine that actually make a difference. If you don’t get in for a facial with Anna though, you can rest assured that her staff are all exceptionally gifted and knowledgeable. All of them have had at least five years of experience and are constantly being trained by Anna herself in the latest techniques.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25731" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] ANNA RELISHES GIVING ADVICE TO HER CLIENTS [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25733" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] THE ULTIMATE ONE STOP SHOP FOR EVERY BEAUTY NEED [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]As usual, my facial was exceptional. Anna’s hands are like angels, and there is something sublimely relaxing about having four hands massage you in tandem. As Anna and Lia move through their heavenly massage motions, the steady stream of steam lulls me into a state not far from sleep. When Anna hands me a mirror at the end my skin looks springy, dewy and hyper hydrated. It’s the kind of facial you get when you need to give your neglected skin some love. And I adore that I can do that and tick some other beauty must-do’s (spray tan, brow shape, bikini way – check!) off the list while I’m there. In a very practical move, the salon has partnered with neighbouring hair salon Wilson Marz to offer a $45 blow dry post-treatment, so you can face the world again with glowing skin and clean hair. A complete top-to-toe service. Review By Sigourney Cantelo [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]

6-celebrity-instagram-accounts-you-need-: 96 Normal 0 false false false EN-AU ZH-TW X-NONE /* Style Definitions */ table.MsoNormalTable {mso-style-name:"Table Normal"; mso-tstyle-rowband-size:0; mso-tstyle-colband-size:0; mso-style-noshow:yes; mso-style-priority:99; mso-style-parent:""; mso-padding-alt:0cm 5.4pt 0cm 5.4pt; mso-para-margin:0cm; mso-para-margin-bottom:.0001pt; mso-pagination:widow-orphan; font-size:11.0pt; font-family:"Century Gothic"; mso-ascii-font-family:"Century Gothic"; mso-ascii-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-hansi-font-family:"Century Gothic"; mso-hansi-theme-font:minor-latin;} From red-carpet selfies to sneak previews of some of the biggest fashion shows, celebrity Instagram accounts are a brilliant source of beauty inspiration. ssif6b0p600zfqvbe0q4hnpfutx9um: Normal 0 false false false EN-US JA X-NONE /* Style Definitions */ table.MsoNormalTable {mso-style-name:"Table Normal"; mso-tstyle-rowband-size:0; mso-tstyle-colband-size:0; mso-style-noshow:yes; mso-style-priority:99; mso-style-parent:""; mso-padding-alt:0cm 5.4pt 0cm 5.4pt; mso-para-margin:0cm; mso-para-margin-bottom:.0001pt; mso-pagination:widow-orphan; font-size:12.0pt; font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-hansi-font-family:Cambria; mso-hansi-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-ansi-language:EN-US;} The turn of a new year often comes with a ravaged complexion, less than fresh highlights and the dehydration that comes from one too many flutes of Möet. this-years-golden-globes-was-all-about-b: Normal 0 false false false EN-US JA X-NONE /* Style Definitions */ table.MsoNormalTable {mso-style-name:"Table Normal"; mso-tstyle-rowband-size:0; mso-tstyle-colband-size:0; mso-style-noshow:yes; mso-style-priority:99; mso-style-parent:""; mso-padding-alt:0cm 5.4pt 0cm 5.4pt; mso-para-margin:0cm; mso-para-margin-bottom:.0001pt; mso-pagination:widow-orphan; font-size:12.0pt; font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-hansi-font-family:Cambria; mso-hansi-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-ansi-language:EN-US;} Good things often come in pairs: Christie Nicolaides earrings or Chanel ballet flats, for example. So, here are favourite beauty moments from this year's Screen Actor Guild awards. Enjoy!
lauren-curtis-beauty-vlogger: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_column_text] We caught up with the business savvy beauty in her sleek Bondi apartment where she shared the secrets to her trademark tresses and lash-tastic look. channel-the-90s: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image="27566" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] After all, the moodiest of eras did reinvent the burgundy lip- prompting Pinot pouts the world over. best-beauty-looks-of-coachella-2017-week: 96 Normal 0 false false false EN-US X-NONE X-NONE /* Style Definitions */ table.MsoNormalTable {mso-style-name:"Table Normal"; mso-tstyle-rowband-size:0; mso-tstyle-colband-size:0; mso-style-noshow:yes; mso-style-priority:99; mso-style-parent:""; mso-padding-alt:0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; mso-para-margin:0in; mso-para-margin-bottom:.0001pt; mso-pagination:widow-orphan; font-size:12.0pt; font-family:Calibri; mso-ascii-font-family:Calibri; mso-ascii-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-hansi-font-family:Calibri; mso-hansi-theme-font:minor-latin;} It’s that time of year again. Mid-April, when all the festival lovers of the world, along with a ton of celebrities, gather in the dusty Colorado desert to celebrate music, fashion and, of course, good times. Coachella looks and trends never fail to disappoint, and this year is no exception. Long days in the desert call for pretty, low-maintenance looks, which we’re all for. Let’s take a look at our favourite beauty looks from this past Coachella weekend.
que-colour-darlinghurst: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]As I arrive and take a seat inside the salon, I’m immediately offered tea and coffee by the lovely staff. The salon itself is intimate and tucked away in the streets of Darlinghurst, allowing you to sit back, relax and let the professionals take care of you. Monique’s team have a plethora of experience under their wings, and many have jetsetted around the globe with a portfolio of star clients in tow.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25250" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]I’m greeted by Taylah, who listens attentively to my aspirations of going lighter and recommends balayage to ease into the lightening process. She starts by adding chocolate foils near the top of the roots, followed by baby blond and biscuity tones throughout the rest of my hair to lighten up around the face. The colourists at Que know how to seamlessly achieve colour that instantly rejuvenates and revives otherwise lacklustre hair. I watch in awe as Taylah does my foils with precision, and then with a freehand technique, sweeps on Olaplex’s Bond Multiplier to the lower sections of my hair. Olaplex is a revolutionary new active ingredient, which lightens and colours the hair without any breakage - perfect for aspiring blondes. We chat away about Fashion week and where she was part of the team backstage with Ginger and Smart this year.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]After a few minutes of waiting for the colour to lift, I’m sent to basin for it all to be washed out. The head massage instantly relaxes any stress and tension I’d brought with me. Taylah also uses Christophe Robin’s Regenerating Mask with Rare Prickly Pear Seed Oil on me, an amazing product which immediately softens and strengthens my hair with the addition of smelling divine! Back at my seat and Taylah starts blow drying my hair, I let out an involuntary gasp - my hair looks incredible. The afternoon light bounces off the new additions of golden hues and I leave the salon feeling like I’ve been transformed into an effortless Parisian It girl without a care in the world. I’ll definitely be coming back for my next colour. Review by Amanda Chan. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25251" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]
mr-burrows-newtown: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Nestled in the eclectic inner west suburb of Newtown, Mr Burrows Hair is a kitschy-cool salon that is fitted out with a woody, inviting interior that feels somewhat like being at home, only more luxurious. Lush gardens make this space a haven in the hustle of the city- and combined with fabulous staff who pay the highest amount of attention to the finer details, Mr Burrows Hair is a heavenly salon experience. Located on Enmore Road right near Newtown Station, Mr Burrows was listed as ‘Australian Hair Fashion Award Finalist’ in 2014 for good reason. Upon arrival, I am greeted with a beverage of choice (My choice? A deliciously bubbly glass of organic champagne) and a gorgeous cheese platter. The staff definitely know how to host a beautiful experience from the get-go. The salon was created by Mr James Burrows himself, who has been working at the height of hair colour and styling for 10 years and working as a senior designer for six. The salon also boasts a line of staff James has clearly trained technically so there is little room for error. All cuts are created to ensure longevity of style (through a particular layering method). Their approach is to gift you with a style that ensures you look glamorous every day, and not just for the few days after you leave the salon. For this reason, they provide in-depth tips on how to recreate the look at home so you aren’t left with that post-salon depression that comes after the next wash. Perfect for anyone who’s far from being an expert with the blow dryer (like yours truly). Mr Burrows have an organic product philosophy which is evident from the shampoo right through to the colours. There’s no harsh chemicals or toxic ingredients in any products, and on top of this, they’re all Australian made. Leaving the salon I feel completely refreshed and confident. It’s actually the first time I’ve walked out of a salon without that nail biting fear or horrible sense of regret. If you’re ever in the inner west and want to stray from your usual, head straight to Mr Burrows.
the-six-met-gala-beauty-looks-you-need-t: Normal 0 false false false EN-US JA X-NONE /* Style Definitions */ table.MsoNormalTable {mso-style-name:"Table Normal"; mso-tstyle-rowband-size:0; mso-tstyle-colband-size:0; mso-style-noshow:yes; mso-style-priority:99; mso-style-parent:""; mso-padding-alt:0cm 5.4pt 0cm 5.4pt; mso-para-margin:0cm; mso-para-margin-bottom:.0001pt; mso-pagination:widow-orphan; font-size:12.0pt; font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-font-family:Cambria; mso-ascii-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-hansi-font-family:Cambria; mso-hansi-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-ansi-language:EN-US;} New York’s night of nights is upon us, where all of the glossiest celebrities don their finest couture for fashion’s biggest party, The Met Gala. We’ve been pouring over social media for the last hour ‘ohh-ing’ and ‘ahh-ing’ over each and every glamorous shot, and admiring the handiwork of some of the worlds finest hair and makeup artists. This is our curation of some of the most shocking, amazing and simply unbelievable beauty looks to grace the red carpet.
define-your-brows-like-a-beauty-icon: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image="27743" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]From shape to shade, the architecture of ‘brow envy’ is a fascinating science. Whether you’re pining for a pair a la’ Audrey Hepburn or hell bent on defining the line, with a bevvy of over the counter brow products on hand, it’s possible to lift your brow game to iconic proportions. We’ve collated a visual history of some of the best arches, with the crème de la crème of the brow brigade all in one place. No brow? No problem!
six-products-were-suddenly-coveting-from: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image="27856" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] WE LOVE THIS MODEL LINEUP BACKSTAGE WE ARE KINDRED CAPTURED BY GETTY IMAGES. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]
chi-spa-shangri-la-hotel-sydney: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Tucked away inside one of Sydney’s most well-positioned high rise hotels, Chi, The Spa at Shangri La Hotel, Sydney offers a decadent and exotic escape from the urban jungle. Fusing Asian design principles with ambient lighting and high end, all-natural range Sodashi skincare, the spa takes on an other-worldly feel, while being conveniently located in the heart of the CBD.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Stepping inside the dimly-lit space I’m instantly transported to a spa retreat in Bangkok or Hong Kong. A large marble slab displaying stunningly-scented Lumira candles and Sodashi products invites a moment of calm discovery, while exotic motifs and bronze bells adorn the walls and surfaces. I’m led to a little relaxation nook around the corner to fill out my treatment card. The spa, which has been open since 2010, is one of the few in the city to offer treatments seven days a week until 9pm. And, as I discover when I’m led through for my treatment, the rooms are humongous. There’s a vast dressing room with a toilet and shower, where I change into my disposable underwear. I clock a comb and hair elastic (clever) as well as the standard robe and jewellery plate arrangement. Once robed up, I step through into the room and take in the deep infinity-edge bath and expansive space. Since I’m 24 weeks pregnant and I have trouble lying on my back for long periods I’ve opted for a pregnancy massage instead of a facial, but the spa has recently added Sodashi’s incredible Samadara Ultimate Age-Defying Facial to their treatment menu. The indulgent 1 hour, 45 minute bliss out is pretty special (I have tried it before) and includes a Rose Quartz crystal massage and gorgeous chakra experience.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25614" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] GENTLE LIGHTING ADDS TO THE AMBIENCE [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25616" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] T2 TEAS AND LUMIRA CANDLES MAKE GORGEOUS GIFTS [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Today, however, I couldn’t be happier to be having a massage – I’m starting to get all the wonderful aches associated with growing and carrying a tiny person, so practically dive onto the treatment bed with excitement. My therapist, Kristina arranges me carefully on my side with various pillows supporting the bump and proceeds to knead her way around each limb with long, luxurious strokes. When the hour and a half is up, I levitate out of the spa and almost get lost going back to my room.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Damien and I are escaping the grind for a night and have checked in to the hotel for a mini date night. Our Horizon Club room (which has recently been renovated) doesn’t disappoint. I spend most of our stay transfixed by the view that stretches out over the glittering Harbour past the Bridge and Opera House and all the way to Manly Heads. There’s something so calming watching the ferries and sailboats plot their frothy break-water course across the Harbour. The busy ant-like humans below contrast with the calm feeling you get from being so high above it all. It’s a strange, omniscient, Eagle-like experience and I like it. I can barely tear myself away but our room grants us access into the exclusive Horizon Club lounge, which offers complimentary drinks and canapes between 5pm and 7pm, so Damien head down to admire the view from a different vantage point. If you want an escapist experience in the middle of the city, then the Chi, The Spa is an excellent choice. I love that they also offer full use of the gym, jacuzzi, sauna, sun terrace (where you can order lunch) and spectacular indoor pool for spa guests who have booked treatments for over an hour.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25617" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] THE ULTIMATE TREAT AT CHI SPA IS A MASSAGE [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] Review by Sigourney Cantelo
who-sarah-jagger-make-up-artist: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_custom_heading text="Sarah invited us into her chic London abode and shared the secrets behind her stunning yet low-key look." font_container="tag:h3|text_align:left" css_animation="fadeInUp"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]
amy-jean-eye-couture-sydney: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Stepping into the exclusive Bambini Trust building, you know you’re about to have a luxurious experience. And Amy Jean’s diminutive salon doesn’t disappoint. Regarded as the “Arch Angel” to Australia’s A-List, AJ has built a reputation as being the best at her business – and that is the business of “dressing the eyes”.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25714" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] FRESH BLOOMS AND BESPOKE WALLPAPER DECORATE THE SPACE [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Just as a couturier creates bespoke garments for his clientele, Amy Jean analyses her clients face and creates stunning lashes and brows that perfectly frame the eyes – which she has done for everyone from Dannii Minogue to Delta Goodrem. She currently has four salons in Sydney, Melbourne, The Gold Coast and Brisbane and is so in demand she has done pop up salons in Perth and Paris. “I believe eyes are windows to the soul,” says Amy Jean passionately. “I love to create and I’ve always been a keen artist.” Although it can take months to secure an appointment with the eye stylist herself, AJ has trained her staff in her particularly precise technique and she closely coaches them to maintain a top level of service.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]However it’s Amy Jean’s service I’m lucky enough to experience today. As I step into the chic dark-walled space of the reception, I take in the sparkling chandelier and a shiny gold plaque above the desk announcing “Amy Jean Eye Couture”. There’s soft lighting and a vase laden with fresh red roses. The waiting room is filled with the mouthwatering caramel scent emanating from Amy Jean’s very own branded candle. There are fashion-focused coffee table books for me to flick through and a range of AJ’s preferred products at eye height for play and purchase – including Dr Spiller skincare, Priori Lash Recovery Serum and her own range of Eye Couture products. I’m a big fan of the Eyebrow Putty and I can’t resist stroking the silky soft makeup brushes that are on display. Above the register a top shelf is lined with bottles of Bollinger – a clue to Amy Jean’s bubbly personality.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25716" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] AJ IS KNOWN FOR HER PRECISION AND KNACK WITH TWEEZERS [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25717" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] AMY JEAN PALAZZO CANDLES IN COCONUT SPLICE FILL THE ROOM [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]I don’t have to wait long as the brow queen herself sweeps in wearing a black bodycon dress and towering YSL Tribute heels. Her platinum hair frames an immaculately made up face with wide lash-lined eyes. There’s no mistaking it, she’s a walking advertisement for her business. We step into her white, light-filled treatment room where the walls are papered with pink flamingos and there are white roses spilling out of a vase in the corner. I settle back into the treatment bed, ready for my brow shape and lash lift (which involves perming the lash so it stands up by itself and tinting it – negating the need for mascara). AJ is also an expert in Feathertouch – a form of brow tattooing for sparse or patchy brows – sadly I can’t try this as I’m pregnant, but I make a note to do it as soon as I’m able to.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]The next hour goes by in a flash as we gossip and catch up on life, before AJ presents me with a hand mirror to admire her handiwork. I’m stunned. My straggly brows have been replaced by sharp, defined arches and my lashes, which were looking stubby and sad after months of extension-abuse, are tinted and curled – which apparently lasts for eight weeks. Every service is finished with a makeup touch up using her own range of Amy Jean Eye Couture cosmetics, so I’m able to face the world without any telltale waxing redness. I only wonder why I didn’t get my eyes styled sooner. Review by Sigourney Cantelo [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25718" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] AJ AND ONE OF HER BEST CLIENTS - DELTA GOODREM [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]
how-to-do-barefaced-beauty-like-a-beatni: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="36880" img_size="full" alignment="center"][vc_separator][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] From muted neutrals to disheveled folk hair, barely-there bases are the new rule of thumb as we saw at the recent collections in Paris. What may appear to be a result of little to no groundwork and near perfect skin, don’t be fooled, the sheer luminosity and crème de nude trend that dominated the runway isn’t completely naked. This season is a throwback to one of our favorite eras, the swinging and (and turns out, rather subtle) 1960’s. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]
loccitane-petit-spa: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] The opening day is a particularly auspicious moment to review the new L’Occitane Petit Spa. A fact that’s not lost on me, as I front up to the lovely French beauty brand’s store on a well-groomed street in the Perth suburb of Subiaco. I’m one of five media that have been flown over Western Australia for the media launch, and the excitement is palpable. The team have had all hands on deck to prepare and were apparently still screwing in lightbulbs last night, ahead of our arrival. Today however, not a hand cream is out of place, and the deliciously-scented soaps are stacked just-so, as the staff stand, in freshly pressed uniforms, smiling proudly. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="27975" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] THE SPA'S SIGNATURE YELLOW HUES [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]L’Occitane (pronounced LOX-EE-THAN) Australia’s managing director Caroline Le Roch welcomes us warmly as we’re given berry smoothies and freshly squeezed orange juice and encouraged to explore the store. The renovation has been advised by the companies “L’Occitane Home” concept – a worldwide initiative to make the stores feel more homely and inviting. It totally works. I feel like I’ve wandered into my chic aunt’s kitchen in Provence. If my auntie lived in Provence. There is an abundance of natural light, terracotta mosaic tiles and warm wooden finishes. “We want customers to feel at home inside our stores,” explains the brand’s marketing director, Stacey Trinh. “It’s a bit brighter now, and easier to navigate,” she says, gesturing to open display stands of travel sized body washes and facial mists, that are as brightly-coloured and tempting as confectionary.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]We’re ushered up creaky, freshly painted wooden stairs (“it’s a period building, we weren’t able to change too much,” explains Stacey) to the Petit Spa – which is the name given to the smaller spas that are attached to L’Occitane’s retail spaces. There are currently 70 spas in 25 countries worldwide – 12 of which are ‘petit’, and after enjoying spectacular success in Asia, the Hong Kong team have been on hand here in Perth all week imparting their wisdom to the staff at the newest spa. The spa is the brand’s second in Australia – their first being the Chahoya Spa by L’Occitane at Cable Beach Resort in Broome. The spa staff found that many of their guests were from Perth originally and, after having treatments, would ask if there was anywhere back home they could experience a little L’Occitane escapism. And so the first Petit Spa simply had to be on the West Coast – a little satellite experience from the full-blown luxury in Broome.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="27977" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] I ADMIRE THE GORGEOUS L'OCCITANE PRODUCTS [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="27980" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] THE ARRAY OF PRODUCTS THAT WAITED ON THE TABLE [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]My therapist Rennie, who greets me at the top of the stairs, is actually from Hong Kong. She wears a crisp navy cotton uniform with a tiny watch pinned to her chest like a nurse in the 1950’s. It’s nostalgic and comforting, at the same time. Once seated in the neat waiting room, I’m given a questionnaire to answer about my state of mind, health and massage preferences before being whisked into a cosy treatment room. On the bed there are tiny vases lavender that have come all the way from Provence and Immortelle flowers (the key ingredient in L’Occitane’s anti-aging line) - also dried and shipped here from Corsica. I’m given the most stylish disposable G-string I’ve ever seen, instructed to don the robe and remove all jewellery. Rennie gives me a beautiful foot bath with the new Relaxing Bath Salts from the Aromachologie range and carefully dries my feet. She mists the bed with the Relaxing Pillow mist and I dive onto it with a sigh of relief, surrendering to the ministry of her hands.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]I have asked for the Relaxing Aromachology massage with some Deep Remedial moves thrown in for good measure. Over the next hour, Rennie combines massage modalities from long Lomi-Lomi strokes (inspired by the Hawaiian massage ritual) that lull me into a state of bliss to staccato acupressure points that soothe my knotted shoulders. It’s the little details in spas that make them cosy and special – like the bowl of lavender flowers underneath the face hole here at the Petit Spa on the massage bed, that are not only so pretty to look at but waft sleep-inducing aromas into your nostrils as you nod off to la-la-land. And that’s what I very nearly do. As my back is pummelled gently, I feel my consciousness dip and dive beyond the treatment room in Perth and far, far away to a field in Provence that heaves with the sultry scent of lavender, bending, redolent in a pastoral breeze. If you want to be transported to somewhere sensorial and relaxing (even when you’re going somewhere as simple as the local shops), then the L’Occitane Petit Spa is well worth a look. Review by Sigourney Cantelo [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="27982" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] MORE YELLOW-THEMED PRODUCTS AND SWEET TREATS [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]
sigourneys-edit-hair: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="37308" img_size="full" alignment="center"][vc_separator][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] Even when I have a hair stylist spend an hour and a half putting in mousse, root lift spray, doing a round brush blowdry, hot tongs, pin curls and hair spray it will drop to a mild wave within half an hour. Isn’t it ironic that whatever we have when it comes to hair, we want the opposite? The “grass is greener” complex is rife when it comes to what’s on our head. I have tried everything in the pursuit of volume and wave. So if a hair tool or product is on this list then it is well and truly goof proof and should probably receive some kind of award. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="37309" img_size="full" alignment="center"][vc_column_text] MASON PEARSON POPULAR BRUSH [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_column_text]
kelly-smythe-stylist: [vc_row css=".vc_custom_1529396908252{padding-top: 30px !important;}"][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="21201" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_column_text] ACTIVE SKIN ESSENTIALS: ULTRACEUTICALS, SKINCEUTICALS AND COSMEDIX. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]
headcase-hair-paddington: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]Paddington’s Oxford Street has seen many iconic stores come and go during its time, however for the past 18 years, one has remained constant. Headcase Hair, which occupies the full length of a landmark Paddo terraced building a few doors up from the post office, opened its doors in 1997. The much-loved salon was created after super stylist Jon Pulitano and colour extraordinaire Vincent Nobile came together to realise their mutual passion for and expertise in hairdressing.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]When Jon and Vincent aren’t in the salon they’re backstage at New York, Milan and Paris Fashion week working with some of the top hair directors in the world. So it’s safe to say, I feel pretty confident letting Jon cut my hair. Walking in to the salon it’s not hard to see why clients return appointment after appointment. The sound of John Legend crooning in the background, crisp monochrome tones along with beautiful mirrored walls that stretch for the entire length of the salon, gives it a sophisticated appeal. All the reflection and some cleverly placed lights make the salon give it a Manhattanesque feel - clearly influenced by the pair’s jetsetting schedules.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25240" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25241" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]When I arrive I’m offered a champagne or my choice from a selection of T2 teas (with an impending deadline tonight, I resist the bubbles and go for a green tea) before chatting to Jon about what we were doing with my hair. I’ve got really thick unruly hair so I’m usually nervous when people cut my hair, but after chatting to Jon I know I’m in good hands. Vincent is a Redken colour ambassador so the salon is filled with the beautiful scent of fresh blowdries and Redken products. Jon uses Pureology (a product line distributed by Redken) shampoo and conditioner on my hair as its great for strengthening dyed hair - especially bleached hair like mine.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]After a wash and a light blowdry it’s time to cut. I tell Jon that I don’t like having noticeable layers in my hair, which is lucky, really, as Jon cuts hair in a way that gives you ‘unnoticeable layering’ while still giving the hair movement. For all those tortured blondes out there like me, Headcase Hair is also a registered Olaplex salon. Olaplex is a miracle product that stops your hair feeling like straw after its been dyed, which, as Jon tells me, is because the product works at reforming and strengthening the bonds of the hair. After my cut, Jon blowdries my hair into beautiful unstructured curls and I’m event-ready. Too bad I’m going back to the office. It’s a good thing though that my blowdry lasts for several days – a few extra spritzes of dry shampoo and I reckon I can stretch it for the week. One clever point of difference for the time-poor and socially-stretched, Headcase Hair also offer makeup in the chair – an aspect Jon and Vincent pride themselves on (having seen the full extent of hair and makeup stress backstage). And on that note, I know exactly where I’ll be coming before my next event.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"] Review by Isabella Ousby. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="25242" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]
how-to-8-ways-to-groom-like-a-new-yorker: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image="22943" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="fadeIn"][vc_column_text] IMAGE: INSTAGRAM @CAITLYNMN [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeIn"]
jocelyn-petroni-woollahra: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]Whenever I walk up the wooden terrace staircase for my facial with Joss, I can feel the stress of the day receding into unimportance. I know this is my time. No interruptions - the phone goes off - and it’s so incredibly precious. Joss is an old friend, I’ve known her for over 10 years – when she did a beautiful facial on me at the top of a hair salon in Paddington, where she had a little room. I knew immediately that she was a beauty superstar in the making, and I wrote about her every chance I got.[/vc_column_text][vc_single_image image="49917" img_size="full"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="49910" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]Stepping into the reception room Joss hands me a coconut water and offers me a cup of tea (it’s all about hydration here). Joss, who has an eye for design, has created a beautiful salon space dubbed 'The Gallery' - it's light and airy, with lofty vaulted ceilings that create a gallery-esque feel. It's all about minimal chic here, with a colour palette of white with black details, and feminine pops of art and Vicki Lee prints adorning the walls. The (totally gorgeous) bathroom comes equipped with Les Eaux de Chanel - perfect for freshening up post-treatment. [/vc_column_text][vc_single_image image="49913" img_size="full"][vc_single_image image="49912" img_size="full"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]In her facial room next door, a giant chandelier hangs over the treatment bed, which is contoured and covered in the finest linens, with an electric blanket that heats it to the perfect temperature before you climb in. There’s a second manicure table in here, positioned by the window, where you can watch the world go by as you have your fingers soaked and expertly buffed by Jocelyn or one of her incredibly talented 2IC’s.[/vc_column_text][vc_single_image image="49915" img_size="full" css_animation="fadeInUp"][vc_single_image image="42741" img_size="full"][vc_column_text]Today is extra special as Joss has booked me in for her amazing facial and mani doubly whammy with Diandra. During this sublimely incredible experience both Joss and Diandra do a massage of your hands and face in tandem that is simply magic – and then you walk out with a flawless manicure. Apart from being beautifully relaxing it appeals to the time-poor multi-tasker in me. An hour and a half goes by in a sort of suspended alternate reality bliss and I come-to groggily feeling as if I’ve been meditating for days. My nails are painted the most perfect Chanel shade of nude, and, as I examine my plump, beaming complexion, I’m ready to face the craziness of the day again. It really is the ultimate indulgence – but a necessary one, I’ve decided.[/vc_column_text][vc_single_image image="49919" img_size="full"][vc_single_image image="49920" img_size="full"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp"]
pinterest-predicts-the-top-beauty-trends: Image by Chris Craymer 96 Normal 0 false false false EN-AU ZH-TW X-NONE /* Style Definitions */ table.MsoNormalTable {mso-style-name:"Table Normal"; mso-tstyle-rowband-size:0; mso-tstyle-colband-size:0; mso-style-noshow:yes; mso-style-priority:99; mso-style-parent:""; mso-padding-alt:0cm 5.4pt 0cm 5.4pt; mso-para-margin:0cm; mso-para-margin-bottom:.0001pt; mso-pagination:widow-orphan; font-size:11.0pt; font-family:"Century Gothic"; mso-ascii-font-family:"Century Gothic"; mso-ascii-theme-font:minor-latin; mso-hansi-font-family:"Century Gothic"; mso-hansi-theme-font:minor-latin;} In an effort to save us scrolling time, the team at Pinterest have rounded up their top-trending 100 pins of the year in topics such as food, travel, women’s style, and of course our favourite of all, beauty.
